arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Accrington: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arne Slot will receive his first taste of the FA Cup's magic on Saturday lunchtime when Liverpool host Accrington Stanley in the third round. A similar fate is unlikely to befall Slot's side this weekend, with Accrington currently languishing in 19th in League Two. The teams have only clashed once before, an FA Cup duel dating back to 1956.

arts.sum: As Accrington Stanley prepare for their FA Cup third-round clash against Liverpool at Anfield on Saturday afternoon, memories of the iconic 1989 milk advert have resurfaced.

arts.ttl: 'That's what pleased me': Arne Slot says he absolutely loved what Liverpool fans did in 60th minute vs Tottenham
Liverpool make offer to sign 26-year-old – Arne Slot thought to be motivation behind effort
arts.sum: In October, Bologna’s Sam Beukema flirted with Liverpool by stating that he would be happy to join the Merseyside club one day. The centre-back said he dreams of making a move to the Premier League, where West Ham United are his favourite club, but would be open to joining the Reds.
